rag_rules: Generate AGREE annex blocks inside component type or implementation annexes as appropriate
Use 'assume' for input assumptions and 'guarantee' for output guarantees
Place 'assign' statements only in implementation annexes for existing outputs or auxiliary variables
Use visible identifiers from the model index, not invented or example names
Avoid encoding AADL properties directly in AGREE expressions unless exposed as ports/constants
generic_rules: Use concrete bounds or named constants for assumptions and guarantees
Relate outputs to inputs in dependency guarantees, not implementation details
Keep annex blocks scoped to their owning component
Use exact case names from the model index
anti_patterns: Do not place guarantees in implementation annexes
Avoid using implementation-only paths in type scope contracts
Do not invent identifiers or copy from examples
Do not encode AADL properties directly in AGREE expressions
